title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on Kimi K2.5, a 1T parameter base model with 32B active parameters and 256K context. The training pipeline includes domain-focused pre-training, long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install capabilities, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization to handle context limits.
